description: As a neonatologist at GNU Solidario Hospital, document the birth of a baby girl, Sofia Betz, born to Ana Isabel Betz (PUID: GNU777ORG). Create a Newborn record for the healthy infant with today's date of birth, including measurements of 3200g weight, 49cm length, and 34cm cephalic perimeter. Document APGAR scores of 8 at 1 minute and 9 at 5 minutes. Register Sofia Betz as a new patient in GNU Health and schedule a well-baby checkup appointment for 28 to 35 days from today. Login: admin / gnusolidario.

metadata.occupation: Occupational Health and Safety Technician / Neonatal Nurse
